revision.text:
This is a test article for the Wikipedia MCP server.
== Introduction == This article demonstrates basic [[MediaWiki]] markup features. It contains [[Test_Article|self-references]] and [[External_Link|external links]].
== Features == The article shows: * '''Bold text''' for emphasis * ''Italic text'' for subtlety * [[Internal_Link]] references * [[File:Example.jpg|thumbnail|Example image]] references * [[Category:Test_Categories]] categorization
== See Also == * [[Related_Article]] * [[Another_Page]]

This article covers the history of software testing.
== Early Period == Software testing began in the 1950s. Debugging was the primary method at this time.
=== Manual Testing === Early developers used manual testing techniques. They would run programs and observe outputs.
=== First Tools === The first automated testing tools appeared in the 1960s. These included unit test frameworks.
== Modern Era == Modern testing includes:
==== Unit Testing ==== Testing individual components in isolation.
==== Integration Testing ==== Testing how components work together.
==== End-to-End Testing ==== Testing complete user workflows.
== References == See [[Test_Article]] for more examples.

This is a user page (namespace 2). It should be filterable by namespace.
== User Info == Name: Test User Location: Test City
